title: I Lift My Eyes Up to the Hills

verses.text: I lift my eyes up to the hills, From where shall come my aid? My help comes from the Lord above, Who heav’n and earth has made.
He will not let your foot be moved; Your keeper will not sleep. Behold he slumbers not, nor sleeps, For he will Isr’el keep.
At your right hand the Lord, your keep- er is your constant shade The moon shall strike you not by night, Nor sun by light of day.
The Lord will keep you from all harm; He keeps your life secure. Your going out and coming in, The Lord keeps evermore.
